'''Nunk "No-Neck" Plaarvin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] who was a notorious criminal during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. A member of [[Raff Syndicate]], he was a former associate of [[Marn Hierogryph]]. In [[3963 BBY]] Hierogryph, under the alias of "Professor Gryphomarn," tried to con him on [[Metellos 3]]. Plaarvin, however, had cracked the con and had [[Jarael]] and [[Rohlan Dyre]] captured and prepared for execution. Later that day Marn Hierogryph and his accomplice [[Zayne Carrick]] attempted another con—this time in an attempt to save their friends. Disguising [[Slyssk]] as a [[Raff Syndicate]] representative, they fooled Plaarvin into thinking that the Syndicate knew about him hiding part of his profits from them. After that they sent him to a "rendezvous" with Syndicate on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jebble]], which, unknown to Plaarvin, was [[Disaster on Jebble|devastated]] several months ago. Before leaving Metellos 3, Plaarvin had left Cipiter and other Chevs to keep operations running for Syndicate.
